title: SafeToActSignal
description: Cash Safety's authoritative safety verdict for a contemplated spend. Consumed by EVERY module that proposes spending (Pay, Bills, Shopping, Tasks, Rewards) per umbrella Provides list and FR-CASH-004. This signal has DOCUMENTED PRECEDENCE: when it flags risk it overrides any optimization recommendation (umbrella 'Conflicting recommendations' edge case; ux-foundations Conflict Banner resolution rule). It is a SAFETY GUARDRAIL derived from the runway, which is itself a MONEY output: when the underlying balance/forecast is stale or missing, verdict MUST be 'withheld' (never a guessed 'safe'). Recommend-only: this signal never moves money (Constitution IV).

profile_id.description: Owning profile. AuthZ is enforced server-side against the validated session identity — never a client-supplied profile_id (FR-X-010/FR-HH-001; threat model IDOR). Household visibility further gated by MemberScope.

verdict.description: safe = spend does not breach the runway safety buffer; caution = spend narrows runway into the buffer-approach band (proceed with awareness); unsafe = spend would breach the buffer / cause a predicted shortfall (overdraft risk) — consumers MUST NOT surface a spend-positive optimization without showing the Conflict Banner and deferring to this signal; withheld = a MONEY input (balance/forecast) is stale or missing and a verdict cannot be computed — consumers withhold the dependent spend recommendation and ask the user to refresh (NEVER treat withheld as safe).

contemplated_amount.description: Optional amount the verdict was evaluated against, integer cents. Omitted for a general 'is it safe to spend right now' query, in which case the verdict reflects current runway headroom only.

projected_lowest_balance_after.description: Lowest projected balance over the horizon AFTER the contemplated amount, integer cents (Constitution VI — a verdict carries the figure that produced it). Present only when contemplated_amount is present and the verdict is not 'withheld'.

runway_days_after.description: Runway days remaining after the contemplated amount; null when withheld or not evaluated against an amount.

shortfall_date.description: Date a shortfall is projected if the user proceeds; null when verdict is safe/withheld.

runway_ref.description: RunwayForecast.forecast_id this verdict was derived from, so consumers can open the full runway picture (links the Conflict Banner's 'View Cash Safety details').

precedence_rank.description: Conflict-resolution precedence (ux-foundations §10.4): Cash Safety SafeToActSignal is rank 1 — always overrides lower-ranked optimization signals. Encoded so consumers resolve conflicts deterministically without hard-coding the rule.

freshness.description: Inherits the freshness of the underlying balance/CashFlowForecast. is_stale=true on a money input ⇒ verdict MUST be 'withheld'.
